ddls:
CREATE TABLE "lottery_draws" (
  "draw_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each draw */,
  "draw_date" TEXT /* Date of the lottery draw */,
  "total_sales" REAL /* Total sales amount generated from ticket sales */,
  "total_prize_amount" REAL /* Total amount allocated for prizes */,
  "draw_status" TEXT /* Status of the lottery draw (e.g., upcoming, in progress, completed) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("draw_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "prizes" (
  "prize_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each prize category */,
  "match_type" TEXT /* Type of match required to win the prize */,
  "prize_per_winner" REAL /* Amount each winner receives */,
  "total_winners" INTEGER /* Total number of winners in this category */,
  "prize_fund_amount" REAL /* Total amount allocated for this prize category */,
  "prize_tier" INTEGER /* Tier of the prize (e.g., 1st, 2nd, 3rd) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("prize_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "winners" (
  "winner_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each winner entry */,
  "draw_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the related lottery draw */,
  "prize_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the related prize category */,
  "region" TEXT /* Region where the winners reside */,
  "winner_count" INTEGER /* Number of winners in this category for this draw */,
  "total_prize_amount" REAL /* Total prize amount received by winners in this category */,
  "claim_status" TEXT /* Status of the prize claim (e.g., pending, claimed, expired) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("winner_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_winners_prize_id FOREIGN KEY ("prize_id") REFERENCES prizes ("prize_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_winners_draw_id FOREIGN KEY ("draw_id") REFERENCES lottery_draws ("draw_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "players" (
  "player_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each player */,
  "player_name" TEXT /* Full name of the player */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the player */,
  "phone" TEXT /* Phone number of the player */,
  "region" TEXT /* Region where the player is located */,
  "account_balance" REAL /* Current account balance of the player */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("player_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "tickets" (
  "ticket_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each ticket */,
  "player_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the player who purchased the ticket */,
  "draw_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the associated lottery draw */,
  "numbers" TEXT /* Numbers chosen by the player on the ticket */,
  "purchase_date" TEXT /* Date when the ticket was purchased */,
  "ticket_price" REAL /* Price of the ticket */,
  "ticket_status" TEXT /* Status of the ticket (e.g., pending, valid, invalid) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("ticket_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_tickets_draw_id FOREIGN KEY ("draw_id") REFERENCES lottery_draws ("draw_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_tickets_player_id FOREIGN KEY ("player_id") REFERENCES players ("player_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "regions" (
  "region_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each region */,
  "region_name" TEXT /* Name of the region */,
  "total_winners" INTEGER /* Total number of winners in this region */,
  "total_prize_amount" REAL /* Total prize amount won by players in this region */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("region_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "draw_prizes" (
  "draw_prize_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each draw-prize relationship */,
  "draw_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the related lottery draw */,
  "prize_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the related prize category */,
  "prize_amount" REAL /* Prize amount allocated for this draw and prize category */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("draw_prize_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_draw_prizes_prize_id FOREIGN KEY ("prize_id") REFERENCES prizes ("prize_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_draw_prizes_draw_id FOREIGN KEY ("draw_id") REFERENCES lottery_draws ("draw_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "ticket_sales" (
  "sale_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each sale entry */,
  "ticket_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the sold ticket */,
  "sale_date" TEXT /* Date of the sale */,
  "amount" REAL /* Amount generated from the sale */,
  "sale_channel" TEXT /* Channel through which the ticket was sold (e.g., online, retail) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("sale_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_ticket_sales_ticket_id FOREIGN KEY ("ticket_id") REFERENCES tickets ("ticket_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access log entry */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the user accessing the system */,
  "access_time" TEXT /* Date and time of access */,
  "action" TEXT /* Action performed by the user (e.g., view statistics, update prizes) */,
  "access_location" TEXT /* Location from which the user accessed the system */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username for accessing the system */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password for accessing the system */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., admin, operator) */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department to which the user belongs */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "winner_claims" (
  "claim_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each claim entry */,
  "winner_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the winner making the claim */,
  "claim_date" TEXT /* Date when the claim was made */,
  "claim_amount" REAL /* Amount claimed by the winner */,
  "claim_status" TEXT /* Status of the claim (e.g., pending, approved, rejected) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("claim_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_winner_claims_winner_id FOREIGN KEY ("winner_id") REFERENCES winners ("winner_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "prize_funds" (
  "fund_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each fund entry */,
  "draw_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the associated lottery draw */,
  "prize_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the associated prize category */,
  "fund_amount" REAL /* Amount allocated to the prize fund */,
  "allocation_date" TEXT /* Date when the fund was allocated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("fund_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_prize_funds_draw_id FOREIGN KEY ("draw_id") REFERENCES lottery_draws ("draw_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_prize_funds_prize_id FOREIGN KEY ("prize_id") REFERENCES prizes ("prize_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "reports" (
  "report_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each report entry */,
  "report_name" TEXT /* Name of the report */,
  "report_date" TEXT /* Date when the report was generated */,
  "report_data" TEXT /* Data contained in the report */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("report_id")
)
